caption: An ancient religious diagram of the human head with cutaways showing the skull within and the brain within that. Complicated network of veins and filigree of pipes. Where is the human soul?! Golden fretwork clouds.

Intricate veins and filigree of pipes create a complicated network, while a blueprint-like representation explores the mysteries of the mind. Beautifully rendered clouds symbolize consciousness, accompanied by the presence of tiny workers in the machine. Parrots gracefully soar amidst the clouds, while intertwined vines and ivy add a touch of nature. caption: IN THE DMT REALM: An ancient religious diagram of the front of the perfect human face and head with cutaways showing the contents within and the brain within that. WHERE DOES CONSCIOUSNESS RESIDE? Sacred Geometry. DIAGRAM OF SOUL. Golden Ratio. ASCEND THE COSMIC SERPENT. Complicated network of veins and filigree of pipes. Where is the human soul?! Blueprint of the mind. Circuit board. Ancient neurological text. Beautiful, finely rendered clouds of consciousness. Many little people are working in the biological clockwork machine. Parrots fly in the sky, amongst the clouds. MOUNTAINS OF THE MIND. Vines and ivy intertwined. Very detailed drawings and diagrams. Background of finely detailed machinery diagram - filigree of pipework amongst the clouds and complicated intertwined vines and veins. Golden fretwork clouds. WE ARE TRULY IN HEAVEN NOW.
source_prompt: IN THE DMT REALM: An ancient religious diagram of the front of the perfect human face and head with cutaways showing the contents within and the brain within that. WHERE DOES CONSCIOUSNESS RESIDE? Sacred Geometry. DIAGRAM OF SOUL. Golden Ratio. ASCEND THE COSMIC SERPENT. Complicated network of veins and filigree of pipes. Where is the human soul?! Blueprint of the mind. Circuit board. Ancient neurological text. Beautiful, finely rendered clouds of consciousness. Many little people are working in the biological clockwork machine. Parrots fly in the sky, amongst the clouds. MOUNTAINS OF THE MIND. Vines and ivy intertwined. Very detailed drawings and diagrams. Background of finely detailed machinery diagram - filigree of pipework amongst the clouds and complicated intertwined vines and veins. Golden fretwork clouds. WE ARE TRULY IN HEAVEN NOW.
source_task2_caption: An ancient religious diagram reveals the intricate contents of the perfect human face and head, exposing the hidden recesses where consciousness resides, surrounded by a complex network of veins and filigree of pipes. The ethereal blueprint of the mind is depicted as a finely rendered circuit board, evoking the wisdom of ancient neurological texts. Beautiful clouds of consciousness float amidst a heavenly backdrop, while miniature beings diligently operate the intricate machinery of the biological clockwork. Parrots soar gracefully through the sky, their vibrant plumage contrasting with the celestial landscape. Vines and ivy intertwine, merging with the finely detailed machinery, creating a mesmerizing blend of natural and artificial elements. This captivating illustration embodies the sacred geometry and evokes a sense of mystique and wonder, transporting the observer to the ethereal realm of the DMT experience.

caption: An ancient religious diagram of the perfect human body, mind and soul. N,N-Dimethyltryptamine molecule throughout all. Delicate skull of carved ivory. WHERE DOES CONSCIOUSNESS RESIDE? Sacred Geometry. DIAGRAM OF SOUL. Golden Ratio. ASCEND THE COSMIC SERPENT to the stars. Complicated network of veins and filigree of pipes. MESCALINE VISIONS. Where is the human soul?! Blueprint of the mind. Circuit boards and piano keyboards. Ancient neurological text. Beautiful, finely rendered clouds of consciousness. Many little people are working in the biological clockwork machine. The inner workings of a fabulous GOD ORGAN IN THE SKY. Parrots fly in the sky, amongst the clouds. MOUNTAINS OF THE MIND. Vines and ivy intertwined. CITIES OF THE SOUL.Very detailed drawings and diagrams. Background of finely detailed machinery diagram - filigree of pipework amongst the clouds and complicated intertwined vines and veins. Golden fretwork clouds. WE ARE TRULY IN HEAVEN NOW.

source_task2_caption: An ancient religious diagram illustrates the perfect human body, mind, and soul, intricately intertwined with a network of vines, veins, and filigree of pipes. The delicate skull, carved from ivory, holds the mysteries of consciousness and the blueprint of the mind. Clouds of consciousness form a beautiful backdrop, while a complex system of circuit boards and piano keyboards hints at the inner workings of this celestial machinery. Amongst the clouds, parrots soar, symbolizing the ascent of the cosmic serpent to the stars. This intricate artwork captures the essence of sacred geometry, the golden ratio, and the interconnectedness of all things, inviting us to ponder the profound questions of our existence.

source_prompt: neighborhood bungalow street night wars, fireworks, fighting helmets guns skunks raccoons possums rats, eating trash, Style Hieronymus Bosch, style James Jean
source_task2_caption: In a neighborhood bungalow street at night, amidst wars, fireworks light up the sky as fighting breaks out. With helmets and guns, the scene becomes a chaotic clash between skunks, raccoons, possums, and rats, all scavenging and devouring trash, creating a surreal composition reminiscent of the styles of Hieronymus Bosch and James Jean.
